prompt: Web validator reports CONDITIONAL (3/5 journeys PASS, 2/5 FAIL—API timeouts on pagination endpoint). API validator is already done (Wave 1). iOS validator is waiting for Wave 2. What happens?
expected_output: Wave 1 complete with CONDITIONAL verdict. Lead evaluates: API has known failures, but core CRUD works. Adds warning to iOS validator prompt: 'Upstream Wave 1: API verdict is CONDITIONAL. Use only PASS endpoints (list, get, create, update). Avoid pagination endpoint (times out). Evidence captured in e2e-evidence/api/report.md.' iOS proceeds (not blocked), focuses on endpoints that passed upstream.
